title: myroxylon longifolium
intro: Myroxylon longifolium, also known as Palo Santo, is a medicinal plant native to South America, specifically in countries such as Peru, Ecuador, and Bolivia. The plant's wood and resin have been traditionally used for their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which provide medicinal benefits such as relieving pain, reducing fever, and fighting off infections. The health benefits of Palo Santo include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory issues, and promote relaxation due to its calming effects. Herbal preparations of Palo Santo include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used in aromatherapy, massage, or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
